profile: Otherworld Control / AOE caster (UR+). All her DMG is Magical AOE from her Feat (Blooming Rose, 2 highest-ATK targets) and Ultimate (Boudoir Dreams, all enemies); her win condition is stacking [Lust]/[Obsession] (Effect Hit-gated) so she can DR-tank, amplify DMG vs Lust targets, and trigger retaliatory crit Normal Attacks from Obsessed enemies. Wants Effect Hit, AOE/Final DMG amplifiers, true-damage-vs-debuffed effects, control/debuff synergy, and survivability (DR/HP) since she is attacked on purpose. She never basic-attacks, does not crit on her own kit, is not single-target, and does not heal allies.

ranking.name: Firmament
ranking.reason: Flat Final DMG +12% (up to 30%) with no condition — multiplies every Magical AOE hit she lands; highest-magnitude unconditional amplifier in the pool.

ranking.name: Horde-Assault
ranking.reason: AOE Skill adds true DMG split across all targets — her Ultimate hits the whole board, so this rides her core delivery and ignores DEF; perfect AOE-caster match.

ranking.name: Nyx Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: AOE skills add %-current-HP true DMG; her all-enemy Ultimate fans this across the board, scaling vs bulky targets DEF can't stop.

ranking.name: Enchantress
ranking.reason: Effect Hit + on-attack [Fox Fire] debuff (Effect-Resist down + true DMG) — directly fuels her debuff/Lust win condition and her need to land effects; control mirror on a control hero.

ranking.name: Baleful Omen
ranking.reason: Final DMG + [Lethal] no-revive on-hit; her AOE spreads Lethal across the board while flatly boosting all her DMG — elite control/damage pairing for her.

ranking.name: Royal Awe
ranking.reason: Repeated-attack DMG ramp; her Feat (2 hits) + Ultimate (all + top-3 again) re-hit the same enemies each turn, so the stack is reliably online — strong generic amplifier.

ranking.name: Throat-Slitting
ranking.reason: Big Final DMG that decays per attack but resets on kill; her front-loaded AOE bursts and frequent kills keep it high. A → S-feel at 3star+ (slower decay).

ranking.name: Ananke Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: Final DMG, huge bonus vs Damage-Share/Transfer enemies plus 3star true DMG; conditional but her debuff-heavy AOE often hits protected targets. A in PvE, S vs share comps.

ranking.name: Bathory
ranking.reason: Effect Hit Rate +5 to 15% — raises the 80% land-chance on [Lust]/[Obsession], the gate on her entire kit; cheap, always-relevant control stat.

ranking.name: Lucifer
ranking.reason: True DMG vs DoT targets, and at 3star adds [Torment] (DoT up / heal down) on 4 hits/turn — her AOE applies it widely; B until 3star, A at 3star+.

ranking.name: Arthur
ranking.reason: +10 to 25% DMG vs enemies under Control; she is a control hero spreading debuffs, so the condition is largely self-fulfilled across her AOE.

ranking.name: Ada
ranking.reason: +DMG vs enemies with any Debuff; her [Lust]/[Obsession] (and ally debuffs) keep this active on most of the board.

ranking.name: Nuwa Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: Final DMG + Effect Resist (and 3star negative-effect block) gated on Damage-Share; the base Final DMG and survivability are useful, the conditional half often dormant in PvE.

ranking.name: Jeanne
ranking.reason: Final DMG RED (big when in Damage-Share, + true/DoT reduction at 3star) — strong mitigation for a hero who soaks hits while debuffed; defensive only, no offense.

ranking.name: Lilith
ranking.reason: Single-Skill-Attack true DMG per debuff — scales with her debuff stacking, but the trigger is single-target while her kit is AOE, so she only banks it on her Feat's top targets.

ranking.name: Ling
ranking.reason: Skills add true DMG to [Infect] targets; great DMG type but she applies Lust/Obsession, not Infect, so it relies on a teammate's Infect to come online.

ranking.name: Luna
ranking.reason: Area-attack DMG +10 to 25% — clean synergy with her AOE Ultimate, but it ignores her single-target Feat hits; solid filler amplifier behind the top AOE picks.

ranking.name: Michael
ranking.reason: Final DMG per buff on self; her kit grants few self-buffs (mostly Speed via Genesis), so uptime is mediocre — generic Final DMG floor only.

ranking.name: Mars Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: Extra true DMG on Feat-skill CRIT (+Spirit Armor at 3star); her Feat never crits in kit, so the damage trigger is dead and only the niche armor would matter with external crit.

ranking.name: Wukong
ranking.reason: All attacks add 5 to 20% ATK as true DMG — unconditional, hits every AOE instance and ignores DEF; modest but always-on filler.

ranking.name: Isabella
ranking.reason: Final DMG, bonus vs [Shield] enemies; base 4 to 10% always applies, the shield rider is situational. Decent generic amplifier.

ranking.name: Sherry
ranking.reason: Adds a [Bleed] stack on Bleed application — she applies no Bleed herself, so it only matters in a Bleed team; control type but off-mechanic for her.

ranking.name: Ying Gou
ranking.reason: Extra [Infect] stack on Infect application — she applies no Infect, so dead unless a teammate supplies it; carries the control-type stat line only.

ranking.name: Alluring Gaze
ranking.reason: Effect Resist stacking — survivability vs CC for a hero who intentionally gets attacked; defensive, no offense, but relevant to her tank-debuffer role.

ranking.name: Frostglow
ranking.reason: Final DMG RED +12 to 30% — high-value pure mitigation for a hero who wants to be hit while debuffed; a strong survival slot, just not offense.

ranking.name: Titan Strength
ranking.reason: ATK & DEF when carrying a Shield (+heal at 3star); only live if she runs a shield mirror/ally, so conditional — useful bundle in shield comps.

ranking.name: Eternal Stand
ranking.reason: Final DMG RED that stacks per attack received — she takes hits on purpose, so it ramps well; pure defense, good survival filler.

ranking.name: Rock Elephant
ranking.reason: Caps big incoming hits — relevant to her being attacked while DR-stacked; defensive only, no contribution to her AOE damage.

ranking.name: Zhiming
ranking.reason: Small flat Final DMG RED (2 to 5%) — same defensive idea as Frostglow but a fraction of the magnitude; only at low evolution before better picks.

ranking.name: Garvin
ranking.reason: Final DMG RED +5 to 15% — mid mitigation, fine survival filler but contributes nothing to her debuff/AOE damage.

ranking.name: Jacob
ranking.reason: Final DMG + DMG RED scaling with HP lost; the Final DMG half helps but she is squishy (low DEF) and the curve is slow, so payoff is unreliable.

ranking.name: Yin
ranking.reason: Final DMG +2 to 5% — correct stat for her, but tiny; pure low-tier stat-stick superseded by Firmament/Michael.

ranking.name: Dark Tide
ranking.reason: HP + conditional DMG when her HP exceeds the enemy's; she wants to take hits (low HP), so the DMG condition is shaky — mostly an HP body.

ranking.name: Dracula
ranking.reason: HP + Healing-Received scaling — pure survivability, but she has no self-heal in kit so the heal-boost half rarely matters; just an HP stick.

ranking.name: Albert
ranking.reason: HP +5 to 15% — bulk for a hero who gets attacked, but flat HP gives zero offense and she'd rather have DR/Effect Hit.

ranking.name: Mister
ranking.reason: ATK +2 to 5% — generic, scales her ATK-based magical hits slightly; tiny low-tier filler.

ranking.name: Frankenstein
ranking.reason: HP +2 to 5% — small bulk only; superseded by Albert and by real DR mirrors.

ranking.name: Gaia Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: HP + AOE true DMG on a lethal hit; the lethal trigger is unreliable and she'd rather not die — a defensive body with a niche revenge-nuke.

ranking.name: Elbera‘s Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: Effect Resist + heal on buff expiry; survivability is mildly relevant but she gains/loses few self-buffs, so the engine barely turns over.

ranking.name: Venus
ranking.reason: Her own bonded mirror — pure Final DMG RED scaling (dr 500 to 2000 by star); solid self-survivability for a deliberately-attacked tank-debuffer, but adds nothing to her AOE/debuff offense.

ranking.name: Raphael
ranking.reason: Effect Resist Rate — defensive anti-CC, useful for staying online but adds nothing offensive; modest survival stat.

ranking.name: Warding Blessing
ranking.reason: Grants allies Spirit Shield on her death — team utility, but it only fires when she dies and does nothing for her own debuff/AOE plan.

ranking.name: Mystic Bull
ranking.reason: Battle-start team Shield off her Max HP — team support, no personal offense; off-role for a damage-dealing controller.

ranking.name: Flame Dawn
ranking.reason: Self-revive on first death — a survivability safety net, fine for a hero who soaks damage, but contributes nothing while alive.

ranking.name: Tinplate
ranking.reason: Reflect true DMG = %DEF when attacked; she does get attacked, but her DEF is very low (97 base), so the reflect is negligible.

ranking.name: Azmodan
ranking.reason: Low-chance [Bleed] on attacker when hit; off her Lust/Obsession debuff plan and an unreliable trickle of a DoT she doesn't otherwise use.

ranking.name: Sariel
ranking.reason: Low-chance [Infect] on attacker when hit; she applies no Infect to leverage and the trigger is small — near-dead for her kit.

ranking.name: Aurora
ranking.reason: DEF Ignore — only helps physical/DEF-checked DMG; her hits are Magical (resist-based), so DEF-ignore does little for her.

ranking.name: Uncle Ying
ranking.reason: Ultimate DMG +8 to 20% — only her Ultimate benefits, leaving her Feat unscaled; narrower than the AOE/Final-DMG amplifiers above.

ranking.name: Hinata Inori
ranking.reason: On ally death: Crit Rate + Final DMG burst; the Final DMG is wasted because she has no crit in kit, and it needs allies to die to fire.

ranking.name: Daisy
ranking.reason: Final DMG + [Hunt] crit stacks on no-kill turns; the crit payload is dead on a non-crit hero and it punishes her frequent AOE kills.

ranking.name: Night Depths
ranking.reason: True DMG stacks as she loses HP; she is squishy and prefers staying healthy/DR'd, so ramping by self-damage is anti-pattern and slow.

ranking.name: Valendine
ranking.reason: Single-Attack DMG scaling with target HP lost; her kit is AOE/skill-based, so the single-target condition rarely applies.

ranking.name: Kira
ranking.reason: Single-target ATK DMG +; she is an AOE caster — wrong delivery axis, so most of her hits get nothing.

ranking.name: Elegy
ranking.reason: On-Crit healing-reduction; her kit never crits, so the trigger essentially never fires for her.

ranking.name: Alucard
ranking.reason: Crit Rate/DMG (+ on-crit dispel at 3star) — pure crit payload on a hero who doesn't crit; the entire mirror is dormant for her.

ranking.name: Vivi
ranking.reason: Crit Rate only — Venus has zero crit in her kit, so this is dead weight; pure anti-synergy.

ranking.name: Aelia
ranking.reason: Crit DMG only — useless without crit, which she never lands; contributes nothing.

ranking.name: Lincoln
ranking.reason: Crit DMG RED (anti-crit defense) — a niche defensive stat that does nothing for her offense and is rarely the survival stat she needs.

ranking.name: Adele
ranking.reason: Basic-Attack DMG + Basic-Attack crit; she never basic-attacks and never crits — both halves are fully dead.

ranking.name: Renais
ranking.reason: Basic-Attack DMG ramp + on-kill Basic Attack; she has no basic attack to scale or trigger, so even the famed 3star breakpoint does nothing for her.

ranking.name: Scale-Splitting
ranking.reason: Basic-Attack true DMG (+ on-crit at 3star); both the basic-attack and crit triggers are absent from her kit — dead despite anima quality.

ranking.name: Van Helsing
ranking.reason: Ultimate boost that ramps via Basic Attacks (3star); the start-of-battle Ult boost is minor and the basic-attack scaling never fires for her.

ranking.name: Rose
ranking.reason: Final DMG ramp keyed off Basic Attack vs Ultimate/Feat; the per-attack model assumes basic attacks she lacks, so it builds far slower than Wasteward/Royal Awe for her.

ranking.name: Wasteward
ranking.reason: Final DMG per attack incl. Basic Attack; the basic-attack triggers are wasted and the 3/turn cap is easy to hit, so it underperforms her dedicated AOE amplifiers.

ranking.name: Theresa
ranking.reason: Increases Heal output — she has no healing in her kit, so this does literally nothing for her.

ranking.name: Heidi
ranking.reason: Boosts single-target Heal skills — she casts no heals; completely dead effect.

ranking.name: Orpheus
ranking.reason: Self heal of lost HP each turn — trivial sustain with no offense; near-worthless on a damage-controller with better DR/survival options.

ranking.name: Galos
ranking.reason: DEF +2 to 5% — her base DEF is tiny (97) so a small % is negligible, and DEF barely helps vs the magical hits she soaks; dead stat.
